pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 50, consistently used across export_result.sh and verifier.py
Referenced throughout setup_task.sh (lines 44, 49), export_result.sh (line 53), and verifier.py (line 58)

setup_task.sh line 53 sets client_type to 'confidential'. Verified as valid CLIENT_TYPE choice in Django OAuth Toolkit: https://github.com/jazzband/django-oauth-toolkit/blob/master/oauth2_provider/models.py

setup_task.sh line 54 sets authorization_grant_type to 'authorization-code'. Verified as valid GRANT_TYPE choice in Django OAuth Toolkit: https://github.com/jazzband/django-oauth-toolkit/blob/master/oauth2_provider/models.py
setup_task.sh line 55 creates OAuth application with exact redirect_uris. Verifier.py line 72-73 performs set-based comparison handling order differences
export_result.sh line 13 defines CRED_FILE path. verifier.py line 117 checks for this file. Task description line 5 instructs saving credentials to this path

privileged_info_summary: This task requires rotating OAuth 2.0 credentials using Django OAuth Toolkit. The existing confidential application 'Logistics_Fleet_Sync_v1' is configured with authorization-code grant type and redirect URIs 'https://logistics-partner.com/oauth/callback https://backup.logistics-partner.com/complete/aerobridge'. The agent must create an identical new application 'Logistics_Fleet_Sync_v2' with the same configuration, save its client credentials (client_id and client_secret) to '/home/ga/Documents/new_credentials.json', and delete the old application. The admin credentials for access are admin/adminpass123.
